final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu cover image announcing GPT-image-2 launch on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, bold graphic design
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and typography arranged along a strong diagonal axis
Subject: launch announcement of GPT-image-2 on Lovart platform, with headline text as the hero element
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal backdrop that lets typography and diagonal layout breathe
Lighting/mood: high contrast, sharp and bold — accent color pops against a dark or neutral ground
Color palette: high-contrast with a strong accent color (e.g., electric blue or vivid red against near-black or white), minimal secondary tones
Materials/textures: flat graphic with crisp edges, magazine-print finish
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: both brand names "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" must appear as legible display text; diagonal layout must be clearly visible; portrait ratio for Xiaohongshu cover
Avoid: cluttered layout, pastel softness, generic social-media template look, gradients that muddy the contrast
